sites.name: Site 1 (Leu)
sites.why: This group packs into a hydrophobic sub-pocket (near LEU411) with no directional contact to orient it — PXR offers five near-isoenergetic sub-sites, and AF3-class models actively mis-place hydrophobic moieties. The atoms sit ~10.0 Å from the crystal.
sites.cite: Sci Rep 2018 (five subsites); AF3 docking-failure analysis 2025 (hydrophobic mis-placement).

sites.name: Site 2 (His)
sites.why: This group sits against a polar residue (HIS407) in PXR's sparse anchor set (Ser247/Gln285/His407 pin canonical agonists). The contact here is weak/edge-on, and PXR's pocket is a large, flexible, mostly-uncharged cavity — so the model under-weighted it and the atoms landed ~9.5 Å off.
sites.cite: Sci Rep 2018 (anchor cluster S247/Q285/H407, uncharged pocket).

sites.name: Site 3 (Leu)
sites.why: This group packs into a hydrophobic sub-pocket (near LEU206) with no directional contact to orient it — PXR offers five near-isoenergetic sub-sites, and AF3-class models actively mis-place hydrophobic moieties. The atoms sit ~6.7 Å from the crystal.
sites.cite: Sci Rep 2018 (five subsites); AF3 docking-failure analysis 2025 (hydrophobic mis-placement).
